title: albizia rufa
intro: Albizia rufa, also known as the East Indian walnut or jangli kaju, is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Fabaceae. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its use in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Albizia rufa include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, extracts, and capsules for consumption, as well as used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
